title: Qdrant Vs Milvus Vs Pinecone Vs Weaviate Benchmarking Code

-

Qdrant Vs Milvus Vs Pinecone Vs Weaviate Benchmarking Code

Learn more about bidirectional Unicode characters
| from db.weaviate.operations.general import sync_by_last_modified, query_by_vector | |
| from db.weaviate.weaviate_client import client as weaviate_client | |
| from qdrant_client import QdrantClient, models | |
| # Add Milvus imports | |
| from pymilvus import MilvusClient, DataType | |
| import time | |
| import numpy as np | |
| # Add Pinecone imports | |
| from pinecone import Pinecone | |
| from pinecone import ServerlessSpec | |
| client = QdrantClient(url="", api_key="") | |
| # Add Milvus client setup | |
| # MILVUS_CLUSTER_ENDPOINT = "" # Replace with your Milvus endpoint | |
| # MILVUS_TOKEN = " # Replace with your Milvus token | |
| # # Initialize Milvus client | |
| # milvus_client = MilvusClient( | |
| # uri=MILVUS_CLUSTER_ENDPOINT, | |
| # token=MILVUS_TOKEN | |
| # ) | |
| # Add Pinecone client setup | |
| PINECONE_API_KEY = "" | |
| PINECONE_HOST = "" | |
| # Initialize Pinecone client | |
| pc = Pinecone(api_key=PINECONE_API_KEY) | |
| # Pinecone index configuration | |
| pinecone_index_name = "test-index" | |
| # Milvus collection configuration | |
| milvus_collection = "quick_setup_weaviate_migration" | |
| qdrant_collection = "test_collection_2" | |
| tenant_field_id = "tenant_name" | |
| try: | |
| client.create_collection( | |
| collection_name=qdrant_collection, | |
| vectors_config=models.VectorParams(size=384, distance=models.Distance.COSINE), | |
| hnsw_config=models.HnswConfigDiff( | |
| payload_m=16, | |
| m=0, | |
| ), | |
| ) | |
| client.create_payload_index( | |
| collection_name=qdrant_collection, | |
| field_name=tenant_field_id, | |
| field_schema=models.KeywordIndexParams( | |
| type="keyword", | |
| is_tenant=True, | |
| ), | |
| ) | |
| except Exception as e: | |
| print(f"Error creating collection: {e}") | |
| from datetime import datetime, timedelta | |
| def migrate_records_to_qdrant(tenant_id: str, days_back: int = 30, batch_size: int = 100, max_records: int = 30000): | |
| """ | |
| Migrates records from Weaviate to Qdrant for a given tenant. | |
| Args: | |
| tenant_id (str): The tenant ID to migrate records for | |
| days_back (int): Number of days back to fetch records from | |
| batch_size (int): Size of each batch to process | |
| max_records (int): Maximum total records to process | |
| """ | |
| last_sync_datetime = datetime.now() - timedelta(days=days_back) | |
| offset = 0 | |
| total_records = 0 | |
| while total_records < max_records: | |
| # Get batch of records | |
| sync_results = sync_by_last_modified( | |
| tenant_name=tenant_id, | |
| last_sync_datetime=last_sync_datetime, | |
| curr_device_id="test_device", | |
| limit=batch_size, | |
| offset=offset | |
| ) | |
| records = sync_results.get("results", []) | |
| if not records: | |
| print("No more records found") | |
| break | |
| # Convert records to PointStruct format | |
| points = [] | |
| skipped_count = 0 | |
| for record in records: | |
| # Get vector, handle nested structure | |
| vector = record.get("vector", {}) | |
| if isinstance(vector, dict) and "default" in vector: | |
| vector_data = vector["default"] | |
| else: | |
| # Skip records without proper vectors | |
| skipped_count += 1 | |
| continue | |
| # Ensure we have a unique id | |
| unique_id = record.get("uniqueid") | |
| if not unique_id: | |
| skipped_count += 1 | |
| continue | |
| points.append( | |
| models.PointStruct( | |
| id=unique_id, | |
| payload={ | |
| "tenant_name": tenant_id, | |
| "title": record.get("title", ""), | |
| "lastModified": str(record.get("lastModified", "")), | |
| "type": record.get("type", "") | |
| }, | |
| vector=vector_data | |
| ) | |
| ) | |
| # Upsert batch to Qdrant | |
| if points: | |
| try: | |
| client.upsert( | |
| collection_name=qdrant_collection, | |
| points=points | |
| ) | |
| print(f"Inserted {len(points)} records into Qdrant (skipped {skipped_count} invalid records)") | |
| except Exception as e: | |
| print(f"Error inserting into Qdrant: {e}") | |
| total_records += len(records) | |
| offset += batch_size | |
| print(f"Total processed: {total_records} records") | |
| print(f"Migration completed. Total records migrated: {total_records}") | |
| return total_records | |
| def query_records(tenant_id: str, query_vector: list, limit: int = 10): | |
| """ | |
| Query records from Qdrant collection using vector similarity search | |
| :param tenant_id: Tenant ID to filter results | |
| :param query_vector: Query vector to find similar vectors | |
| :param limit: Maximum number of results to return | |
| :return: List of matching records | |
| """ | |
| try: | |
| results = client.query_points( | |
| collection_name=qdrant_collection, | |
| query=query_vector, | |
| query_filter=models.Filter( | |
| must=[ | |
| models.FieldCondition( | |
| key="tenant_name", | |
| match=models.MatchValue( | |
| value=tenant_id, | |
| ), | |
| ) | |
| ] | |
| ), | |
| limit=limit | |
| ) | |
| return results | |
| except Exception as e: | |
| print(f"Error querying records: {e}") | |
| return [] | |
| # Milvus migration functions | |
| def setup_milvus_collection(): | |
| """ | |
| Set up Milvus collection with schema matching Weaviate data structure | |
| """ | |
| try: | |
| # Create schema for collection | |
| schema = MilvusClient.create_schema( | |
| auto_id=False, | |
| enable_dynamic_field=True | |
| ) | |
| # Add fields | |
| schema.add_field(field_name="id", datatype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=512, is_primary=True) | |
| schema.add_field(field_name="vector", datatype=DataType.FLOAT_VECTOR, dim=384) | |
| schema.add_field(field_name="tenant_name", datatype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=512) | |
| schema.add_field(field_name="title", datatype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=10048) | |
| schema.add_field(field_name="lastModified", datatype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=512) | |
| schema.add_field(field_name="type", datatype=DataType.VARCHAR, max_length=512) | |
| # Create index params | |
| index_params = MilvusClient.prepare_index_params() | |
| index_params.add_index( | |
| field_name="vector", | |
| index_type="AUTOINDEX", | |
| metric_type="COSINE" # Changed from "Cosine" to "COSINE" | |
| ) | |
| # Create collection | |
| milvus_client.create_collection( | |
| collection_name=milvus_collection, | |
| schema=schema, | |
| index_params=index_params | |
| ) | |
| print(f"Created Milvus collection: {milvus_collection}") | |
| except Exception as e: | |
| print(f"Error setting up Milvus collection: {e}") | |
| # Collection might already exist, try to use it | |
| pass | |
| def migrate_records_to_milvus(tenant_id: str, days_back: int = 30, batch_size: int = 100, max_records: int = 30000): | |
| """ | |
| Migrates records from Weaviate to Milvus for a given tenant. | |
| Args: | |
| tenant_id (str): The tenant ID to migrate records for | |
| days_back (int): Number of days back to fetch records from | |
| batch_size (int): Size of each batch to process | |
| max_records (int): Maximum total records to process | |
| """ | |
| last_sync_datetime = datetime.now() - timedelta(days=days_back) | |
| offset = 0 | |
| total_records = 0 | |
| while total_records < max_records: | |
| # Get batch of records from Weaviate | |
| sync_results = sync_by_last_modified( | |
| tenant_name=tenant_id, | |
| last_sync_datetime=last_sync_datetime, | |
| curr_device_id="test_device", | |
| limit=batch_size, | |
| offset=offset | |
| ) | |
| records = sync_results.get("results", []) | |
| if not records: | |
| print("No more records found") | |
| break | |
| # Prepare data for Milvus insertion | |
| data = [] | |
| skipped_count = 0 | |
| for record in records: | |
| # Get vector, handle nested structure | |
| vector = record.get("vector", {}) | |
| if isinstance(vector, dict) and "default" in vector: | |
| vector_data = vector["default"] | |
| else: | |
| # Skip records without proper vectors | |
| skipped_count += 1 | |
| continue | |
| # Ensure we have a unique id | |
| unique_id = record.get("uniqueid") | |
| if not unique_id: | |
| skipped_count += 1 | |
| continue | |
| # Convert lastModified to string if it's a float/number | |
| last_modified = record.get("lastModified", "") | |
| if isinstance(last_modified, (int, float)): | |
| last_modified = str(last_modified) | |
| elif last_modified is None: | |
| last_modified = "" | |
| # Handle potentially missing or None fields | |
| title = record.get("title", "") | |
| if title is None: | |
| title = "" | |
| type_field = record.get("type", "") | |
| if type_field is None: | |
| type_field = "" | |
| data.append({ | |
| "id": str(unique_id), # Ensure it's a string | |
| "vector": vector_data, | |
| "tenant_name": tenant_id, | |
| "title": str(title), # Ensure it's a string | |
| "lastModified": str(last_modified), # Ensure it's a string | |
| "type": str(type_field) # Ensure it's a string | |
| }) | |
| # Insert batch into Milvus only if we have data | |
| if data: | |
| try: | |
| milvus_client.insert( | |
| collection_name=milvus_collection, | |
| data=data | |
| ) | |
| print(f"Inserted {len(data)} records into Milvus (skipped {skipped_count} invalid records)") | |
| except Exception as e: | |
| print(f"Error inserting into Milvus: {e}") | |
| # Log the first few records for debugging | |
| print(f"Sample data that failed:") | |
| for i, d in enumerate(data[:3]): | |
| print(f" Record {i}: id={d['id']}, has_vector={len(d['vector'])>0}, title_len={len(d['title'])}, type={d['type']}") | |
| total_records += len(records) | |
| offset += batch_size | |
| print(f"Total processed: {total_records} records") | |
| print(f"Migration completed. Total records migrated: {total_records}") | |
| return total_records | |
| def query_milvus_records(tenant_id: str, query_vector: list, limit: int = 10): | |
| """ | |
| Query records from Milvus collection using vector similarity search | |
| Args: | |
| tenant_id (str): Tenant ID to filter results | |
| query_vector (list): Query vector to find similar vectors | |
| limit (int): Maximum number of results to return | |
| Returns: | |
| List of matching records with scores | |
| """ | |
| try: | |
| # Search with filter | |
| results = milvus_client.search( | |
| collection_name=milvus_collection, | |
| data=[query_vector], | |
| filter=f'tenant_name == "{tenant_id}"', | |
| limit=limit, | |
| output_fields=["id", "tenant_name", "title", "lastModified", "type"] | |
| ) | |
| return results[0] if results else [] | |
| except Exception as e: | |
| print(f"Error querying Milvus records: {e}") | |
| return [] | |
| def benchmark_milvus_query(tenant_id: str, num_queries: int = 100, limit: int = 10): | |
| """ | |
| Benchmark Milvus query performance | |
| Args: | |
| tenant_id (str): Tenant ID to use for queries | |
| num_queries (int): Number of queries to run | |
| limit (int): Number of results per query | |
| Returns: | |
| Dictionary with benchmark results | |
| """ | |
| print(f"\nStarting Milvus benchmark for tenant: {tenant_id}") | |
| print(f"Running {num_queries} queries with limit {limit}") | |
| # Generate random query vectors | |
| query_vectors = [np.random.rand(384).tolist() for _ in range(num_queries)] | |
| # Warm up | |
| print("Warming up...") | |
| for i in range(5): | |
| query_milvus_records(tenant_id, query_vectors[0], limit) | |
| # Run benchmark | |
| print("Running benchmark...") | |
| latencies = [] | |
| successful_queries = 0 | |
| start_time = time.time() | |
| for i, query_vector in enumerate(query_vectors): | |
| query_start = time.time() | |
| results = query_milvus_records(tenant_id, query_vector, limit) | |
| query_end = time.time() | |
| latency = (query_end - query_start) * 1000 # Convert to milliseconds | |
| latencies.append(latency) | |
| if results: | |
| successful_queries += 1 | |
| if (i + 1) % 10 == 0: | |
| print(f"Completed {i + 1}/{num_queries} queries") | |
| end_time = time.time() | |
| total_time = end_time - start_time | |
| # Calculate statistics | |
| latencies_sorted = sorted(latencies) | |
| results = { | |
| "total_queries": num_queries, | |
| "successful_queries": successful_queries, | |
| "total_time_seconds": total_time, | |
| "queries_per_second": num_queries / total_time, | |
| "avg_latency_ms": np.mean(latencies), | |
| "min_latency_ms": min(latencies), | |
| "max_latency_ms": max(latencies), | |
| "p50_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[len(latencies_sorted) // 2], | |
| "p95_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[int(len(latencies_sorted) * 0.95)], | |
| "p99_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[int(len(latencies_sorted) * 0.99)] | |
| } | |
| print("\n=== Milvus Benchmark Results ===") | |
| for key, value in results.items(): | |
| if isinstance(value, float): | |
| print(f"{key}: {value:.2f}") | |
| else: | |
| print(f"{key}: {value}") | |
| return results | |
| def benchmark_weaviate_query(tenant_id: str, num_queries: int = 100, limit: int = 10): | |
| """ | |
| Benchmark Weaviate query performance | |
| Args: | |
| tenant_id (str): Tenant ID to use for queries | |
| num_queries (int): Number of queries to run | |
| limit (int): Number of results per query | |
| Returns: | |
| Dictionary with benchmark results | |
| """ | |
| print(f"\nStarting Weaviate benchmark for tenant: {tenant_id}") | |
| print(f"Running {num_queries} queries with limit {limit}") | |
| # Generate random query vectors | |
| query_vectors = [np.random.rand(384).tolist() for _ in range(num_queries)] | |
| # Warm up | |
| print("Warming up...") | |
| for i in range(5): | |
| query_by_vector(tenant_id, query_vectors[0], top_k=limit) | |
| # Run benchmark | |
| print("Running benchmark...") | |
| latencies = [] | |
| successful_queries = 0 | |
| start_time = time.time() | |
| for i, query_vector in enumerate(query_vectors): | |
| query_start = time.time() | |
| results = query_by_vector(tenant_id, query_vector, top_k=limit) | |
| query_end = time.time() | |
| latency = (query_end - query_start) * 1000 # Convert to milliseconds | |
| latencies.append(latency) | |
| if results and results.get("results"): | |
| successful_queries += 1 | |
| if (i + 1) % 10 == 0: | |
| print(f"Completed {i + 1}/{num_queries} queries") | |
| end_time = time.time() | |
| total_time = end_time - start_time | |
| # Calculate statistics | |
| latencies_sorted = sorted(latencies) | |
| results = { | |
| "total_queries": num_queries, | |
| "successful_queries": successful_queries, | |
| "total_time_seconds": total_time, | |
| "queries_per_second": num_queries / total_time, | |
| "avg_latency_ms": np.mean(latencies), | |
| "min_latency_ms": min(latencies), | |
| "max_latency_ms": max(latencies), | |
| "p50_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[len(latencies_sorted) // 2], | |
| "p95_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[int(len(latencies_sorted) * 0.95)], | |
| "p99_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[int(len(latencies_sorted) * 0.99)] | |
| } | |
| print("\n=== Weaviate Benchmark Results ===") | |
| for key, value in results.items(): | |
| if isinstance(value, float): | |
| print(f"{key}: {value:.2f}") | |
| else: | |
| print(f"{key}: {value}") | |
| return results | |
| def benchmark_qdrant_query(tenant_id: str, num_queries: int = 100, limit: int = 10): | |
| """ | |
| Benchmark Qdrant query performance | |
| Args: | |
| tenant_id (str): Tenant ID to use for queries | |
| num_queries (int): Number of queries to run | |
| limit (int): Number of results per query | |
| Returns: | |
| Dictionary with benchmark results | |
| """ | |
| print(f"\nStarting Qdrant benchmark for tenant: {tenant_id}") | |
| print(f"Running {num_queries} queries with limit {limit}") | |
| # Generate random query vectors | |
| query_vectors = [np.random.rand(384).tolist() for _ in range(num_queries)] | |
| # Warm up | |
| print("Warming up...") | |
| for i in range(5): | |
| query_records(tenant_id, query_vectors[0], limit) | |
| # Run benchmark | |
| print("Running benchmark...") | |
| latencies = [] | |
| successful_queries = 0 | |
| start_time = time.time() | |
| for i, query_vector in enumerate(query_vectors): | |
| query_start = time.time() | |
| results = query_records(tenant_id, query_vector, limit) | |
| query_end = time.time() | |
| latency = (query_end - query_start) * 1000 # Convert to milliseconds | |
| latencies.append(latency) | |
| if results: | |
| successful_queries += 1 | |
| if (i + 1) % 10 == 0: | |
| print(f"Completed {i + 1}/{num_queries} queries") | |
| end_time = time.time() | |
| total_time = end_time - start_time | |
| # Calculate statistics | |
| latencies_sorted = sorted(latencies) | |
| results = { | |
| "total_queries": num_queries, | |
| "successful_queries": successful_queries, | |
| "total_time_seconds": total_time, | |
| "queries_per_second": num_queries / total_time, | |
| "avg_latency_ms": np.mean(latencies), | |
| "min_latency_ms": min(latencies), | |
| "max_latency_ms": max(latencies), | |
| "p50_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[len(latencies_sorted) // 2], | |
| "p95_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[int(len(latencies_sorted) * 0.95)], | |
| "p99_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[int(len(latencies_sorted) * 0.99)] | |
| } | |
| print("\n=== Qdrant Benchmark Results ===") | |
| for key, value in results.items(): | |
| if isinstance(value, float): | |
| print(f"{key}: {value:.2f}") | |
| else: | |
| print(f"{key}: {value}") | |
| return results | |
| # Pinecone migration and benchmark functions | |
| def setup_pinecone_index(): | |
| """ | |
| Set up Pinecone index (using existing index) | |
| Note: The index already exists, so we're just getting a reference to it | |
| """ | |
| try: | |
| # Get the existing index | |
| index = pc.Index(host=PINECONE_HOST) | |
| # Get index stats to verify it's working | |
| stats = index.describe_index_stats() | |
| print(f"Connected to Pinecone index with {stats.total_vector_count} vectors") | |
| return index | |
| except Exception as e: | |
| print(f"Error connecting to Pinecone index: {e}") | |
| return None | |
| def migrate_records_to_pinecone(tenant_id: str, days_back: int = 30, batch_size: int = 95, max_records: int = 30000): | |
| """ | |
| Migrates records from Weaviate to Pinecone for a given tenant. | |
| """ | |
| # Get the index | |
| index = setup_pinecone_index() | |
| if not index: | |
| print("Failed to connect to Pinecone index") | |
| return 0 | |
| last_sync_datetime = datetime.now() - timedelta(days=days_back) | |
| offset = 0 | |
| total_records = 0 | |
| # Create a namespace for this tenant | |
| namespace = f"tenant_{tenant_id}" | |
| while total_records < max_records: | |
| # Get batch of records from Weaviate | |
| sync_results = sync_by_last_modified( | |
| tenant_name=tenant_id, | |
| last_sync_datetime=last_sync_datetime, | |
| curr_device_id="test_device", | |
| limit=batch_size, | |
| offset=offset | |
| ) | |
| records = sync_results.get("results", []) | |
| if not records: | |
| print("No more records found") | |
| break | |
| # Prepare records for Pinecone with integrated embedding | |
| records_to_upsert = [] | |
| skipped_count = 0 | |
| for record in records: | |
| # Ensure we have a unique id | |
| unique_id = record.get("uniqueid") | |
| if not unique_id: | |
| skipped_count += 1 | |
| continue | |
| # Get title and ensure it's not empty | |
| title = record.get("title", "") | |
| if title: | |
| title = title.strip() | |
| if not title: # Skip records with empty titles | |
| skipped_count += 1 | |
| continue | |
| # Convert lastModified to string if it's a float/number | |
| last_modified = record.get("lastModified", "") | |
| if isinstance(last_modified, (int, float)): | |
| last_modified = str(last_modified) | |
| elif last_modified is None: | |
| last_modified = "" | |
| type_field = record.get("type", "") | |
| if type_field is None: | |
| type_field = "" | |
| # Format for upsert_records with integrated embedding | |
| # The text field will be automatically embedded by Pinecone | |
| records_to_upsert.append({ | |
| "_id": str(unique_id), | |
| "text": title, # This field will be embedded automatically | |
| "tenant_name": tenant_id, | |
| "title": title, | |
| "lastModified": str(last_modified), | |
| "type": str(type_field) | |
| }) | |
| # Upsert batch to Pinecone | |
| if records_to_upsert: | |
| try: | |
| index.upsert_records( | |
| namespace, | |
| records_to_upsert | |
| ) | |
| print(f"Inserted {len(records_to_upsert)} records into Pinecone (skipped {skipped_count} invalid/empty records)") | |
| except Exception as e: | |
| print(f"Error inserting into Pinecone: {e}") | |
| # Print sample data for debugging | |
| print(f"Sample record: {records_to_upsert[0] if records_to_upsert else 'None'}") | |
| total_records += len(records) | |
| offset += batch_size | |
| print(f"Total processed: {total_records} records") | |
| print(f"Migration completed. Total records migrated: {total_records}") | |
| return total_records | |
| def query_pinecone_records(tenant_id: str, query_vector: list, limit: int = 10): | |
| """ | |
| Query records from Pinecone index using vector similarity search | |
| Args: | |
| tenant_id (str): Tenant ID to filter results | |
| query_vector (list): Query vector to find similar vectors | |
| limit (int): Maximum number of results to return | |
| Returns: | |
| List of matching records with scores | |
| """ | |
| try: | |
| index = pc.Index(host=PINECONE_HOST) | |
| namespace = f"tenant_{tenant_id}" | |
| # Query with namespace (namespace acts as tenant filter in Pinecone) | |
| results = index.search( | |
| namespace=namespace, | |
| query={ | |
| "inputs": {"text": "writing"}, | |
| "top_k": limit | |
| }, | |
| fields=["title"] | |
| ) | |
| print(results) | |
| return results.matches if results else [] | |
| except Exception as e: | |
| print(f"Error querying Pinecone records: {e}") | |
| return [] | |
| def benchmark_pinecone_query(tenant_id: str, num_queries: int = 100, limit: int = 10): | |
| """ | |
| Benchmark Pinecone query performance | |
| Args: | |
| tenant_id (str): Tenant ID to use for queries | |
| num_queries (int): Number of queries to run | |
| limit (int): Number of results per query | |
| Returns: | |
| Dictionary with benchmark results | |
| """ | |
| print(f"\nStarting Pinecone benchmark for tenant: {tenant_id}") | |
| print(f"Running {num_queries} queries with limit {limit}") | |
| # Generate random query vectors | |
| query_vectors = [np.random.rand(384).tolist() for _ in range(num_queries)] | |
| # Warm up | |
| print("Warming up...") | |
| for i in range(5): | |
| query_pinecone_records(tenant_id, query_vectors[0], limit) | |
| # Run benchmark | |
| print("Running benchmark...") | |
| latencies = [] | |
| successful_queries = 0 | |
| start_time = time.time() | |
| for i, query_vector in enumerate(query_vectors): | |
| query_start = time.time() | |
| results = query_pinecone_records(tenant_id, query_vector, limit) | |
| query_end = time.time() | |
| latency = (query_end - query_start) * 1000 # Convert to milliseconds | |
| latencies.append(latency) | |
| if results: | |
| successful_queries += 1 | |
| if (i + 1) % 10 == 0: | |
| print(f"Completed {i + 1}/{num_queries} queries") | |
| end_time = time.time() | |
| total_time = end_time - start_time | |
| # Calculate statistics | |
| latencies_sorted = sorted(latencies) | |
| results = { | |
| "total_queries": num_queries, | |
| "successful_queries": successful_queries, | |
| "total_time_seconds": total_time, | |
| "queries_per_second": num_queries / total_time, | |
| "avg_latency_ms": np.mean(latencies), | |
| "min_latency_ms": min(latencies), | |
| "max_latency_ms": max(latencies), | |
| "p50_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[len(latencies_sorted) // 2], | |
| "p95_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[int(len(latencies_sorted) * 0.95)], | |
| "p99_latency_ms": latencies_sorted[int(len(latencies_sorted) * 0.99)] | |
| } | |
| print("\n=== Pinecone Benchmark Results ===") | |
| for key, value in results.items(): | |
| if isinstance(value, float): | |
| print(f"{key}: {value:.2f}") | |
| else: | |
| print(f"{key}: {value}") | |
| return results | |
| def compare_all_benchmarks(milvus_results: dict, weaviate_results: dict, qdrant_results: dict, pinecone_results: dict = None): | |
| """ | |
| Compare benchmark results between Milvus, Weaviate, Qdrant, and optionally Pinecone | |
| Args: | |
| milvus_results: Benchmark results from Milvus | |
| weaviate_results: Benchmark results from Weaviate | |
| qdrant_results: Benchmark results from Qdrant | |
| pinecone_results: Benchmark results from Pinecone (optional) | |
| """ | |
| # Determine if we're comparing 3 or 4 databases | |
| include_pinecone = pinecone_results is not None | |
| if include_pinecone: | |
| print("\n=== Performance Comparison (All Databases) ===") | |
| print(f"{'Metric':<25} {'Milvus':<12} {'Weaviate':<12} {'Qdrant':<12} {'Pinecone':<12} {'Best':<10}") | |
| print("-" * 93) | |
| else: | |
| print("\n=== Performance Comparison (All Databases) ===") | |
| print(f"{'Metric':<25} {'Milvus':<12} {'Weaviate':<12} {'Qdrant':<12} {'Best':<10}") | |
| print("-" * 81) | |
| metrics = [ | |
| ("Queries/second", "queries_per_second", True), # True = higher is better | |
| ("Avg latency (ms)", "avg_latency_ms", False), | |
| ("P50 latency (ms)", "p50_latency_ms", False), | |
| ("P95 latency (ms)", "p95_latency_ms", False), | |
| ("P99 latency (ms)", "p99_latency_ms", False), | |
| ("Min latency (ms)", "min_latency_ms", False), | |
| ("Max latency (ms)", "max_latency_ms", False) | |
| ] | |
| for display_name, key, higher_is_better in metrics: | |
| milvus_val = milvus_results[key] | |
| weaviate_val = weaviate_results[key] | |
| qdrant_val = qdrant_results[key] | |
| values = { | |
| "Milvus": milvus_val, | |
| "Weaviate": weaviate_val, | |
| "Qdrant": qdrant_val | |
| } | |
| if include_pinecone: | |
| pinecone_val = pinecone_results[key] | |
| values["Pinecone"] = pinecone_val | |
| if higher_is_better: | |
| best = max(values.items(), key=lambda x: x[1])[0] | |
| else: | |
| best = min(values.items(), key=lambda x: x[1])[0] | |
| if include_pinecone: | |
| print(f"{display_name:<25} {milvus_val:<12.2f} {weaviate_val:<12.2f} {qdrant_val:<12.2f} {pinecone_val:<12.2f} {best:<10}") | |
| else: | |
| print(f"{display_name:<25} {milvus_val:<12.2f} {weaviate_val:<12.2f} {qdrant_val:<12.2f} {best:<10}") | |
| # Calculate relative performance | |
| print("\n=== Relative Performance (compared to Weaviate) ===") | |
| if include_pinecone: | |
| print(f"{'Metric':<25} {'Milvus vs Weaviate':<20} {'Qdrant vs Weaviate':<20} {'Pinecone vs Weaviate':<20}") | |
| print("-" * 85) | |
| else: | |
| print(f"{'Metric':<25} {'Milvus vs Weaviate':<20} {'Qdrant vs Weaviate':<20}") | |
| print("-" * 65) | |
| for display_name, key, higher_is_better in metrics: | |
| milvus_val = milvus_results[key] | |
| weaviate_val = weaviate_results[key] | |
| qdrant_val = qdrant_results[key] | |
| if key == "queries_per_second": | |
| # For QPS, positive means better | |
| milvus_diff = ((milvus_val - weaviate_val) / weaviate_val) * 100 | |
| qdrant_diff = ((qdrant_val - weaviate_val) / weaviate_val) * 100 | |
| if include_pinecone: | |
| pinecone_val = pinecone_results[key] | |
| pinecone_diff = ((pinecone_val - weaviate_val) / weaviate_val) * 100 | |
| else: | |
| # For latency, negative means better | |
| milvus_diff = ((weaviate_val - milvus_val) / weaviate_val) * 100 | |
| qdrant_diff = ((weaviate_val - qdrant_val) / weaviate_val) * 100 | |
| if include_pinecone: | |
| pinecone_val = pinecone_results[key] | |
| pinecone_diff = ((weaviate_val - pinecone_val) / weaviate_val) * 100 | |
| if include_pinecone: | |
| print(f"{display_name:<25} {milvus_diff:+.1f}%{'':<14} {qdrant_diff:+.1f}%{'':<14} {pinecone_diff:+.1f}%") | |
| else: | |
| print(f"{display_name:<25} {milvus_diff:+.1f}%{'':<14} {qdrant_diff:+.1f}%") | |
| # Main execution for all three database benchmarks | |
